titleStmt.title: SII 15.229: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 229. (A.R. No. 464 of 1926.) SIDDHĀPUR, DHARWAR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the Siddēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1080, Bahudhānya, Āshāḍha-amāvāsyā, Monday, Dakshi, ṇāyana-saṅkramaṇa, corresponding to 1158 A.D., June 27. The weekday, however, was Friday.

The inscription recounts the Kadamba praśasti and states that Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Śivachitta-Vīra-Permāḍi and Yuvarāja-Kumāra Vijayāditya were governing Palasige Twelve-Thousand and Koṅkaṇa Nine-Hundred from Saṁpagāḍi. It registers gifts for worship, offerings and repairs in the temple of the god Pañchaliṅga of Hosavoḷal situated in Kittūr Thirty by the four Prabhus, Aṟuvattokkalu and Five Hundred Tōṇṭigas.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi cāravē traiḷōkyana
rāraṁbha
svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśva
raṁ banavāsipuravarādhīśvaraṁ samastabhuvanasaṁ
stūyamāna haradharaṇīprasūta triḷōcanaka
daṁba vaṁśamahōdaya mahīdharēṁda śikharābhyuda
yamānamahāpracaṁḍamā¨rttaṁṇḍa mā¨rttaṁṇḍakarāti
tībranijapratāpavaśīkritasakaḷamahīmaṇḍaḷa
nuttuṁgasiṁhalāṁchanaṁ vānaramahādhvajaṁ pe¨rmmaṭṭitū
¨ryyani¨rgghōśaṇaṁ caturāśītinagarādhiṣṭitāṣṭāda
śāśvamēdhayajñadīkṣādīkṣitakuḷaprasūta hima
vadgirīṁdraruṁdraśikharasthāpitamahāśaktiprabhā
va tyāgajagajhaṁpa jhaṁpaṇācā¨ryya niśśaṁkarāma
śubhaṭakanakanikaśōpaḷa śaraṇāgatavajraprākāra
lōkaikakaḷpadruma saṁkrāntidhavaḷa mū¨rttinārāya
ṇa kī¨rttimā¨rttaṁṇḍa maṁḍaḷika lalāṭapaṭṭa vairigha
raṭṭa śubhaṭarājaśikhāmaṇi kādaṁbacūḍāmaṇītyā
khiḷanāmāvaḷī samāḷaṁkritarappa śrīmanmahāma
ṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ śrī śivacittavīrapa¨rmmāḍidēvarasaru śrī
madyuvarājakumāra śrī vijayādityadēvara
saruṁ saṁpagāḍiya nelevīḍinoḷi¨rddhu �siga panni
cchāsiramaṁ koṁkaṇavoṁbhaynūṟa maṁ duṣṭani
graha śiṣṭa pratipāḷanayiṁdāḷdu sukhasaṁkathāvinō
dadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttamire [.] svasti yamaniyama svā
dhā yadyānadhāraṇamōnānusthāṇa �pasamā
dhiśīḷasaṁpannarappa hūsavoḷala prabhumukha(khya)
dāmōdarabhaṭṭōpādhyāyaru Anaṁtabhaṭṭōpā
dhyāyaroḷagāgi nāluvaru prabhumukhyavaṟu
vattokkaluṁ tōṁṭegaruvainū¨rvvarumi¨rddu biṭṭa dha
¨rmmameṁteṁdaḍe śakava¨rśaṁ 1080 neya bahudhānya saṁ
vatsarada Āśāḍhadamāvāsya sōmavāradaṁdu da
kṣiṇāyana saṁkrānti vyatīpātada puṇyatithiyoḷu
kittūru mūvattara baḷiya bāḍa hosavaḷala śrī
paṁcaliṁgadēvaraṁgabhōga nivēdyakkaṁ khaṁḍasphuṭita
jī¨rṇṇōddhārakkaṁ Aṟuvattokkalu Okkalalli baṇṇigego
ḷaga 1 Oṁdu hoṟe 1 tōṁṭigaru Okkalalli caitrakke pāṭi
ga 1 pavitrakke pāga 1 Aynūṟanāluvaru Okka
lalli caitrakke pāga 1 pavitrakke pāga 1 Avaralli
gātrakke pāga 1 Ugura mūnūrvaru Okkalalli cai
trakke pāga 1 pavitrakke pāga 1
sa 1 hoṟege Arevīsa The remaining pertion is broken off.
Digital edition of SII 15.229 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
